title: Infleqtion and Churchill Capital Corp X Complete Business Combination
why:
- Infleqtion has completed its business combination with Churchill Capital Corp X, finalizing its transition to a publicly traded company.
- Infleqtion will become the first publicly listed neutral-atom quantum technology company and will begin trading on the NYSE under the ticker symbol "INFQ" on February 17, 2026.
- Infleqtion designs, builds, and sells quantum computers, precision sensors, and software to governments, enterprises, and research institutions.
- Its commercial portfolio includes quantum computers, quantum clocks, RF receivers, and inertial sensors, which are optimized by proprietary software and used by organizations such as the U.S. Department of War, NASA, and the U.K. government.
- Infleqtion is the only public company with commercial leadership across both quantum computing and precision sensing, utilizing a scalable and cost-efficient neutral-atom technology platform.
